# R package CalibrateSSB

| [CalibrateSSB on CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=CalibrateSSB) |  | [pkgdown website](https://statisticsnorway.github.io/ssb-calibratessb/) |  | [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/statisticsnorway/ssb-calibratessb) |
|----|----|----|----|----|

------------------------------------------------------------------------

[![Mentioned in Awesome Official
Statistics](https://awesome.re/mentioned-badge.svg)](http://www.awesomeofficialstatistics.org)

### Weighting and Estimation for Panel Data with Non-Response

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Installation

You can install SSBtools from CRAN with

``` r

install.packages("CalibrateSSB")
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Some of the functions

|  |  |
|----|----|
| [AkuData()](https://statisticsnorway.github.io/ssb-calibratessb/reference/AkuData.html) | Generate test data |
| [CalibrateSSB()](https://statisticsnorway.github.io/ssb-calibratessb/reference/CalibrateSSB.html) | Calibration weighting and estimation |
| [PanelEstimation()](https://statisticsnorway.github.io/ssb-calibratessb/reference/PanelEstimation.html) | Variance estimation for panel data |

📌 See the [broader list of available
functions](https://statisticsnorway.github.io/ssb-calibratessb/reference/index.html).

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Description

CalibrateSSB is an R-package that handles repeated surveys with
partially overlapping samples. Initially the samples are weighted by
linear calibration using known or estimated population totals. A robust
model based covariance matrix for all relevant estimated totals is
calculated from the residuals according to the calibration model.
Alternatively a design based covariance matrix is calculated in a very
similar way. A cluster robust version is also possible. In the case of
estimated populations totals the covariance matrix is adjusted by
utilizing the theory of Särndal and Lundström (2005). Variances of
linear combinations (changes and averages) and ratios are calculated
from this covariance matrix. The linear combinations and ratios can
involve variables within and/or between sample waves.

### References

Langsrud, Ø (2016): “A variance estimation R-package for repeated
surveys - useful for estimates of changes in quarterly and annual
averages”, Romanian Statistical Review nr. 2 / 2016, pp. 17-28.
CONFERENCE: New Challenges for Statistical Software - The Use of R in
Official Statistics, Bucharest, Romania, 7-8 April.
<https://www.revistadestatistica.ro/wp-content/uploads/2016/06/RRS2_2016_A021.pdf>

Särndal, C.-E. and Lundström, S. (2005): Estimation in Surveys with
Nonresponse, John Wiley and Sons, New York.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`AkuData()`](https://statisticsnorway.github.io/ssb-calibratessb/reference/AkuData.md)
  : Generate test data
- [`CalSSBobj()`](https://statisticsnorway.github.io/ssb-calibratessb/reference/CalSSBobj.md)
  : Create or modify a CalSSB object
- [`CalSSBobjReGenesees()`](https://statisticsnorway.github.io/ssb-calibratessb/reference/CalSSBobjReGenesees.md)
  : Create a CalSSB object from a ReGenesees/cal.analytic object
- [`CalibrateSSB-package`](https://statisticsnorway.github.io/ssb-calibratessb/reference/CalibrateSSB-package.md)
  : Weighting and Estimation for Panel Data with Non-Response
- [`CalibrateSSB()`](https://statisticsnorway.github.io/ssb-calibratessb/reference/CalibrateSSB.md)
  : Calibration weighting and estimation
- [`CalibrateSSBpanel()`](https://statisticsnorway.github.io/ssb-calibratessb/reference/CalibrateSSBpanel.md)
  : Calibration weighting and variance estimation for panel data
- [`CrossStrata()`](https://statisticsnorway.github.io/ssb-calibratessb/reference/CrossStrata.md)
  : Crossing several factor variables
- [`LinCombMatrix()`](https://statisticsnorway.github.io/ssb-calibratessb/reference/LinCombMatrix.md)
  [`LagDiff()`](https://statisticsnorway.github.io/ssb-calibratessb/reference/LinCombMatrix.md)
  [`Period()`](https://statisticsnorway.github.io/ssb-calibratessb/reference/LinCombMatrix.md)
  [`PeriodDiff()`](https://statisticsnorway.github.io/ssb-calibratessb/reference/LinCombMatrix.md)
  : Creation of linear combination matrices
- [`PanelEstimation()`](https://statisticsnorway.github.io/ssb-calibratessb/reference/PanelEstimation.md)
  : Variance estimation for panel data
- [`WideFromCalibrate()`](https://statisticsnorway.github.io/ssb-calibratessb/reference/WideFromCalibrate.md)
  : Rearrange output from CalibrateSSB (calSSB object). Ready for input
  to PanelEstimation.
- [`print(`*`<calSSB>`*`)`](https://statisticsnorway.github.io/ssb-calibratessb/reference/print.calSSB.md)
  : Print method for calSSB
- [`print(`*`<calSSBwide>`*`)`](https://statisticsnorway.github.io/ssb-calibratessb/reference/print.calSSBwide.md)
  : Print method for calSSBwide
